project_type: Full-stack SaaS PWA - FastAPI backend + React frontend
test_framework: pytest (backend), vitest potential (frontend) - greenfield, to be set up
build_command: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
test_command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ --tb=short; cd ../frontend && npm run build
verification_instructions: Backend: uvicorn app.main:app runs, GET /health returns 200. Frontend: npm run build succeeds, npm run dev serves app at localhost:5173
setup_instructions: 1. cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt 2. cd frontend && npm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Python 3.11 via pyenv, Node.js v22 via nvm. No Supabase instance available for live testing - code must be structurally valid. No WeasyPrint system deps (cairo/pango) likely missing. Google Vision API key not available for testing.
contribution_requirements: Follow AGENT_EXECUTION_PLAN.md task ordering. Backend in backend/, frontend in frontend/. Use FastAPI+Supabase-py for backend, React 18+Vite+TailwindCSS+TypeScript for frontend.
key_patterns: Greenfield project. Patterns defined by PRD: Pydantic v2 models, FastAPI routers under app/routers/, services under app/services/, Zustand stores, TanStack Query for data fetching, React Router v6 with nested layouts.
directory_structure: backend/ - FastAPI app with app/main.py, app/config.py, app/routers/, app/services/, app/models/, migrations/. frontend/ - React+Vite app with src/pages/, src/components/, src/api/, src/stores/, src/hooks/, src/types/, public/
